name: xAI Team
description: High-signal xAI launches from official xAI announcements and docs.
headline: Verified xAI releases across {days} days.
subtitle: November 2025 — April 2026. Official xAI model and platform updates.
footnote: Cross-checked on May 4, 2026 against official xAI announcements and docs.

releases.title: Grok 3 API opened
releases.description: xAI opened Grok 3 API access for developers with updated reasoning and coding capabilities.

releases.title: xAI enterprise console
releases.description: xAI launched an enterprise console with usage analytics, role controls, and project-level billing separation.

releases.title: Grok Vision beta
releases.description: xAI introduced beta vision understanding with image-grounded chat and OCR-assisted reasoning.

releases.title: Speech to Text API GA
releases.description: xAI made Speech to Text generally available with batch and streaming transcription support across 25 languages.

releases.title: Grok 3.5 rollout
releases.description: xAI rolled out Grok 3.5 with stronger coding evals and improved tool-use reliability.

releases.title: Grok Voice Think Fast 1.0 released
releases.description: xAI released grok-voice-think-fast-1.0 for the Voice Agent API, focused on complex multi-step voice workflows, low latency, and robust tool orchestration.

releases.title: API cost tracking in usage responses
releases.description: xAI API responses now include exact request cost in cost_in_usd_ticks across chat completions, Responses API, image generation, video generation, and streaming.
